content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the tracing-focused changes in `src/contexts/milestone_record/controller.rs`, `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs`, `src/adapters/br_health.rs`, `src/adapters/br_process.rs`, and `src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs` against `master`. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues in the reviewable code changes. Validation: `cargo test`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, and `cargo fmt --check` passed. `nix build` was started but did not finish within the review window.

## Amendments

None.
